meaning: n.(20世纪产生于美国的一种舞曲性音乐)爵士乐,喧闹adj.爵士乐的,喧吵的,颜色过于艳丽的vi.奏爵士乐,跳爵士舞,游荡vt.奏爵士乐,使活泼
examples: He put some jazz on the stereo.
Jazz is mother's milk to me.
I only play jazz as a hobby.
Just barely behind in import is one of the world's great music events: Jazz Fest.
Much of the jazz world doesn't quite know what to make of Marco Benevento.
